scripts.build:ai-worker: node -e "const cp=require('child_process'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); cp.spawnSync('C:\\Program Files\\dotnet\\dotnet.exe',['publish','ai-worker/QSAIWorker.csproj','-c','Release','-r','win-x64','--self-contained'],{stdio:'inherit',shell:false}); const src=path.join('ai-worker','bin','Release','net8.0-windows','win-x64','publish'); const dst=path.join('resources','ai-worker'); fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); for(const f of fs.readdirSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f));} console.log('Copied publish output to resources/ai-worker/');"
scripts.build:electron: vite build && node -e "delete process.env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; require('child_process').spawnSync('npx', ['electron-builder'], {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true})"
